The veteran's perspective and emphasis on national security over bureaucratic delays resonated, nudging the opinion slightly more positive.

request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws tie our hands in protecting citizens. The 2024 Boston incident proved we need modern tools to stop threats before they strike. Critics claim 'civil liberties,' but when seconds count, we can't afford bureaucratic delays. Our allies like Germany and Japan have already updated their frameworks - why are we lagging? #NationalSecurityFirst
